hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; fe="${f%%/frontend/*}/frontend"; case "$f" in "$fe"/*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; cd "$fe" || exit 0; npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx) npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1 || true ;; esac
